Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing

Our plans are simple, transparent, and reasonable to suit your requirements. We charge only for what is provided — no hidden fees.

  • Starter

    ₹999 /month

    Perfect for single-outlet restaurants just getting started with online orders.

    • 1 restaurant outlet
    • Up to 3 delivery platforms
    • Order management dashboard
    • Basic menu management
    • Email support
    Get Started

  • Growth

    ₹2,499 /month

    For growing restaurants that need advanced features and deeper insights.

    • Up to 3 restaurant outlets
    • Unlimited delivery platforms
    • Advanced order management
    • Full menu & pricing sync
    • In-depth analytics & reports
    • Priority support
    Start Free Trial

  • Enterprise

    Custom

    For multi-chain restaurants and cloud kitchen operators with custom needs.

    • Unlimited outlets
    • Unlimited delivery platforms
    • Custom integrations
    • Dedicated account manager
    • SLA-backed uptime
    • Custom reports & API access
    Contact Sales

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

  • Is there a free trial?

    Yes! You can sign up and use Foaps for free during the trial period. No credit card required.

  • Can I change my plan later?

    Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings.

  • Are there any hidden charges?

    No. Our plans are simple, transparent, and reasonable. We charge only for what is provided and no extra/hidden charges are incurred.

  • Do you offer discounts for annual billing?

    Yes, annual billing comes with a discount compared to monthly pricing. Contact us for details.

Still have questions? Talk to our team.

We'd love to help you find the right plan for your restaurant.
